overview: Layer the audio for immersion. Upgrade the train horn at stations, add crossing bells at crossover pieces, apply reverb/echo to chug sounds inside tunnels, refine the speed-synced chug rhythm, add a volume slider, and improve the mute button to cycle through 3 states.

tasks.title: Upgrade Station Horn — Two-Tone with Frequency Sweep
tasks.description: Replace the existing station() SFX with a more satisfying two-tone train horn that uses a frequency sweep. The current station sound is a simple ding-ding-ding. The new horn should be a proper descending two-tone blast, like a real train horn approaching a station.
changes: Replace SFX.station() implementation with a two-note horn using frequency ramps (start at ~520Hz sweep down to ~440Hz, second tone at ~392Hz sweep to ~349Hz)
Use 'triangle' wave for warmer horn timbre, with a slight 'sawtooth' harmonic layer
Duration ~0.8s total, with the two tones overlapping slightly
acceptance_criteria: Station horn plays when train passes station during play
Horn has two distinct tones with audible frequency sweep
Horn sounds more satisfying/realistic than old ding-ding
No audio glitches or clicks

tasks.title: Crossing Bell at Crossover Pieces
tasks.description: When the train passes through a crossover piece, play a rapid ding-ding-ding crossing bell sound, like a railroad crossing signal.
changes: Add SFX.crossingBell() — rapid high-pitched bell (3-4 dings at ~1400Hz, spaced ~100ms apart)
In advanceTrainAnim, when train enters a crossover cell, trigger the crossing bell
Add cooldown to prevent retriggering on same crossover within 2 seconds
acceptance_criteria: Crossing bell plays when train enters a crossover piece
Bell is a rapid ding-ding-ding pattern (3-4 dings)
Bell doesn't retrigger if train loops back through same crossover within 2s
Sounds distinct from station horn

tasks.title: Tunnel Echo — Reverb on Chug Inside Tunnel
tasks.description: When the train is inside a tunnel, the chug sound should have a reverb/echo effect applied, making it sound like the train is in an enclosed space.
changes: Create a ConvolverNode or use delay-based reverb when train is in tunnel
Modify the chug loop to detect when any active train's anim.inTunnel is true
Apply a simple delay-feedback reverb (delay ~0.1s, feedback gain ~0.3) to chug sounds when in tunnel
Smoothly transition reverb in/out as train enters/exits tunnel
acceptance_criteria: Chug sound has noticeable echo/reverb when train is inside tunnel
Echo smoothly starts when entering tunnel and fades when exiting
No audio artifacts or glitches during transition
Reverb only applies to chug, not to other sounds

tasks.title: Refine Speed-Synced Chug Rhythm
tasks.description: The current chug rhythm exists but could be more satisfying. Refine the timing to create a more rhythmic choo-choo-choo-choo pattern that feels organic.
changes: Adjust chug interval calculation: use a more musical formula that maintains rhythmic feel across speeds
Add subtle pitch variation between alternating chugs (higher/lower)
Ensure the chug rhythm restarts cleanly when speed changes mid-play
acceptance_criteria: Chug rhythm sounds like a real steam train (choo-choo pattern)
Rhythm stays musical at all speed settings (0.3x to 4x)
Speed slider changes are reflected immediately
No double-triggering or missed beats when speed changes

tasks.title: Volume Slider in Controls
tasks.description: Add a volume slider next to the mute button that controls the master volume of all sound effects.
changes: Add a range input (0 to 1, step 0.05) in the controls bar, styled to match the speed slider
Create a masterGain node in the audio context that all sounds route through
Connect all sound output to masterGain before ctx.destination
Persist volume level to localStorage
Restore volume on page load
acceptance_criteria: Volume slider visible in controls near mute button
Slider adjusts volume of all sound effects in real-time
Volume level persists across page refreshes
Volume slider works independently of mute button
Mute overrides slider (mute = silent regardless of slider position)

tasks.title: Three-State Sound Icon (🔊→🔉→🔇)
tasks.description: Upgrade the mute button to cycle through 3 volume states instead of just on/off: full volume, reduced volume, and muted.
changes: Change toggleMute() to cycle through 3 states: full (🔊), low (🔉), mute (🔇)
Full = masterGain at slider value, Low = masterGain at 0.3x slider value, Mute = 0
Update the button text/emoji for each state
Save state to localStorage
acceptance_criteria: Clicking sound button cycles: 🔊 → 🔉 → 🔇 → 🔊
🔊 = full volume, 🔉 = reduced volume (30%), 🔇 = muted
State persists across page refreshes
Volume slider still works in full and low modes

testing_focus: All new sounds play without glitches
No regression on existing sounds (place, rotate, remove, whistle, crash, etc.)
Performance: no audio context issues with many sounds
